expected_behavior: ViewModel advice tests cover suggested actions based on domain result.
risk_notes: User said AI feature not needed.

user_story: As a user I want to inspect DNS requests observed by the VPN.
expected_behavior: LogActivity displays LogEntry rows from VPN DNS logging.
risk_notes: Useful diagnosis feature.

user_story: As a user I want DNS logs sorted usefully such as by top-level domain.
expected_behavior: LogEntrySort provides comparators for log ordering.
risk_notes: Usability polish.

user_story: As a user I want to create a redirect or rule from a logged request.
expected_behavior: Log UI includes redirect dialog resources and callback surfaces.
risk_notes: Advanced diagnostic action.

user_story: As a root user I want clear expectations if DNS logging is unavailable.
expected_behavior: TcpdumpUtils root capture is intentionally disabled and returns no logs.
risk_notes: Root mode still exposes logging entry points but capture is disabled.
error_notes: Verify root-mode log screen copy does not imply live capture works.

user_story: As a user I want light dark or system theme mode.
expected_behavior: PrefsMainFragment binds dark theme preference and recreates activity.
risk_notes: Basic app preference.

user_story: As a user I want to switch between root and VPN modes from preferences.
expected_behavior: PrefsMainFragment marks the active method, opens active method settings, launches onboarding for the inactive method row, and does not change the stored method before onboarding completion.
test_state: Connected Preferences method-row routing matrix passed
risk_notes: Misconfiguration can disable protection; preferences open the generic onboarding chooser rather than preselecting the tapped target method.
fix_status: Test-only route proof added; no production defect exposed

user_story: As a root user I want IPv4 and IPv6 redirect addresses validated.
expected_behavior: PrefsRootFragment validates redirection preferences with InetAddresses.
risk_notes: Bad redirect IP can break networking.

user_story: As a root user I want optional localhost web server controls only when available.
expected_behavior: PrefsRootFragment starts stops tests and disables webserver preferences if unavailable.
risk_notes: Native webserver is security-sensitive.

user_story: As a VPN user I want app-managed bypass to be explicit because it can leak traffic.
expected_behavior: Active VPN preference row opens VPN settings; PrefsVpnFragment shows explicit bypass-risk copy, persists the bypass switch, and restarts VPN when changed.
status: Fixed and covered by connected UI flow
test_state: Connected active-VPN settings flow passed after red failure
risk_notes: Leak-prone setting; inactive method rows still switch through onboarding.
error_notes: Preferences main method rows overrode fragment navigation, so active VPN users could not reach VPN bypass/system-exclusion settings from the obvious settings row.

user_story: As a VPN user I want to choose user apps excluded from VPN filtering.
expected_behavior: PrefsVpnExcludedAppsActivity lists installed launchable apps and restarts VPN after changes.
risk_notes: Privacy and leak risk.

user_story: As a VPN user I want system app exclusion options applied to VPN builder.
expected_behavior: Active VPN preference row opens VPN settings; system-app exclusion choices persist through PrefsVpnFragment and VpnBuilder reads those choices when establishing the tunnel.
test_state: Connected settings persistence flow passed; VPN builder addDisallowedApplication seam still needs direct device or test-double proof
risk_notes: Can break DNS routing.
error_notes: The same hidden VPN settings navigation defect also blocked the visible system-app exclusion setting path.
fix_status: UI path fixed; builder application still open

user_story: As a user I want daily hosts updates with optional unmetered-network constraint.
expected_behavior: PrefsUpdateFragment enables SourceUpdateService with wifi-only preference.
risk_notes: Background update reliability.

user_story: As a user I want optional daily app update checks and channel selection.
expected_behavior: PrefsUpdateFragment enables ApkUpdateService and controls beta setting based on store.
risk_notes: Store-dependent behavior.

user_story: As an Android 13+ user I want a shortcut to notification settings if notifications are disabled.
expected_behavior: PrefsUpdateFragment shows app notification settings preference based on POST_NOTIFICATIONS.
risk_notes: Android-version specific.

user_story: As a user I want to export and restore block rules as JSON.
expected_behavior: PrefsBackupRestoreFragment launches document pickers and BackupExporter or BackupImporter.
risk_notes: Data portability.

user_story: As a user I want Android backup and restore to preserve preferences and rules when available.
expected_behavior: AppBackupAgent backs up SharedPreferences and rules JSON through BackupAgentHelper.
risk_notes: Platform backup integration has no direct test evidence.

user_story: As a user I want Force English and crash-report controls to behave predictably.
expected_behavior: PrefsMainFragment applies app locales and binds Sentry telemetry toggle or disables it in stub builds.
risk_notes: Privacy and localization.

user_story: As a user I want to check if a new app version is available.
expected_behavior: UpdateModel retrieves manifest and Home shows update availability.
risk_notes: Secondary update path.

user_story: As a direct-build user I want APK updates verified before install.
expected_behavior: ApkIntegrityVerifier checks manifest signature APK hash and certificate digest.
risk_notes: Supply-chain sensitive.

user_story: As a user I want update downloads to show pending and complete status.
expected_behavior: UpdateActivity and UpdateViewModel render PendingDownloadStatus and CompleteDownloadStatus.
risk_notes: Download clarity.

user_story: As a direct-release user I want self-update available only in the intended signed channel.
expected_behavior: Build flavors keep installer permission out of normal builds and directRelease enables self-update for AdAway-signed store.
risk_notes: High-risk boundary but source-contract tested.

user_story: As a user I want startup update checks to run only when the setting says so.
expected_behavior: PreferenceHelper exposes startup update preference and HomeActivity now checks it on fresh launch only.
risk_notes: Device/network launch behavior still needs full user-story test.
error_notes: Preference was user-visible but inert; fixed by wiring fresh Home launch to HomeViewModel.checkForAppUpdate.

user_story: As a user I want update FilterLists and VPN notifications separated by channel.
expected_behavior: NotificationHelper creates Updates FilterLists and VPN channels with descriptions and importances.
risk_notes: Channel importance cannot change after creation on existing installs.

user_story: As a user I want actionable alerts for hosts and app updates.
expected_behavior: NotificationHelper builds distinct clearable notifications that open Home or UpdateActivity.
risk_notes: Android notification permission can hide alerts.

user_story: As an Android 13+ user I want a clear path to enable notifications if blocked.
expected_behavior: PrefsUpdateFragment shows app notification settings when POST_NOTIFICATIONS is denied.
risk_notes: Runtime settings behavior needs API-level coverage.

user_story: As a user I want More to expose domain checker adware preferences and support actions.
expected_behavior: MoreFragment wires secondary app destinations and support links.
risk_notes: Full navigation/device pass still needed for every More row.
error_notes: More GitHub/Help row directly launched ACTION_VIEW and could crash when no external Activity handled the link; fixed with resolver and exception guards.

user_story: As a user I want to scan installed apps for known adware packages.
expected_behavior: AdwareFragment AdwareLiveData and AdwareViewModel populate scan results.
risk_notes: Package visibility constraints.

user_story: As a user I want adware detection rules to stay accurate.
expected_behavior: AdwareLiveData scans installed activity receiver and service component prefixes against static matchers.
risk_notes: Explorer found no direct matcher tests and the static prefix list may be stale.
error_notes: Add matcher tests or decide whether to remove this low-confidence feature.

user_story: As a user I want a detected adware app removable through Android uninstall flow.
expected_behavior: AdwareInstall and AdwareFragment start uninstall intents for detected apps.
risk_notes: External uninstall flow.

user_story: As a user I want app version project and license information available.
expected_behavior: AboutActivity is reachable from preferences and About resources render app information.
risk_notes: MIT goal depends on license clarity.

user_story: As a user I want the Quick Settings tile to toggle ad blocking.
expected_behavior: AdBlockingTileService is registered with BIND_QUICK_SETTINGS_TILE and toggles service state while tolerating a missing tile handle.
risk_notes: Full Android tile interaction still needs device pass.
error_notes: updateTile assumed getQsTile was non-null; fixed with a null guard and regression contract.

user_story: As a user I want protection restored after reboot when configured.
expected_behavior: BootReceiver handles BOOT_COMPLETED, ignores non-boot broadcasts, restores VPN only when VPN method and boot preference are enabled, requests VPN permission without starting the service when permission is missing, and starts VPN only after permission is available.
existing_test_evidence: Focused connected boot-restore behavior test and unit hardening contract
test_state: Focused connected boot-restore test passed locally; unit and android-test compile gates passed with JDK 21
risk_notes: Protection persistence. Direct receiver and policy behavior covered; physical reboot delivery remains part of release smoke.
error_notes: Before fix, the permission-required VPN boot path requested VPN permission and also attempted to start the VPN service in the same callback.
retest_status: Focused connected test passed; unit gate and android-test compile passed locally

user_story: As an integrator I want signed commands to trigger AdAway actions.
expected_behavior: CommandReceiver is exported with signature permission and handles SEND_COMMAND.
risk_notes: Exported receiver.

user_story: As a user I want scheduled work and state repaired after app update.
expected_behavior: UpdateReceiver handles MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED and repairs hosts, app-update, and filter-set scheduled work from persisted preferences.
risk_notes: Release smoke still needed for real app upgrade path.
error_notes: UpdateReceiver only logged MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED; fixed by resyncing hosts update, app update, and filter-set schedules from persisted preferences.

user_story: As a user I want launcher shortcuts for Preferences DNS requests and Your lists.
expected_behavior: Static shortcuts target PrefsActivity LogActivity and ListsActivity with app icons and labels.
risk_notes: Explorer flagged hardcoded targetPackage org.adaway may drift in alternate builds.
error_notes: Decide whether shortcut targetPackage must be flavor-aware.

user_story: As a release operator I want GPL and MIT boundary reports before release.
expected_behavior: check-license-boundary writes source and artifact reports.
risk_notes: MIT is blocked without provenance clearance.

user_story: As a release operator I want signed manifests checksums APK hash and cert proof.
expected_behavior: verify-release-artifacts produces verification report and release readiness consumes it.
risk_notes: Supply-chain gate.

user_story: As a release operator I want a real device launch proof for release APK.
expected_behavior: run-release-smoke records package signer device hash launch pid and source commit.
risk_notes: External gate remains.

user_story: As a release operator I want human-reviewed screenshots across font scale and RTL before release.
expected_behavior: run-ux-matrix creates review packet and verify-ux-signoff validates checked packet.
risk_notes: Automated tests cannot replace visual judgment.

user_story: As a release operator I want one report tying release proof artifacts to one source commit.
expected_behavior: verify-release-readiness checks reports hashes source commit release tag APK SBOM and UX packet hash.
risk_notes: Final proof gate.
